seo.title: Ven Megham(Nannare) Song Lyrics Guru
seo.description: Full Ven Megham songs lyrics, Guru Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vairamuthu, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): Shreya Goshal.
seo.keywords: Vairamuthu, Guru, AR Rahman, Shreya Goshal, Ven Megham full lyrics, Guru songs lyrics, Ven Megham lyrics snippets, Ven Megham WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Ven Megham lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ven Megham'?

'Ven Megham' conveys deep emotions of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics by Vairamuthu.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Guru'?

In Guru, the song reflects the protagonist's romantic feelings and the journey of love, enhancing the film's emotional depth.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Ven Megham'?

The song is sung by Shreya Goshal and composed by AR Rahman, known for his exceptional musical talent.

When was 'Ven Megham' released?

'Ven Megham' was released on November 18, 2006, as part of the movie Guru.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song 'Ven Megham' from the movie *Guru*, Shreya Goshal's soulful voice brings to life the emotions of love and yearning. The lyrics by Vairamuthu beautifully articulate the feelings of romance, making it a heartfelt melody. The composition by AR Rahman adds a layer of depth, creating a soothing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This song is perfect for romantic occasions, evoking a sense of nostalgia and warmth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ven Megham from Guru is a mesmerizing romantic ballad that showcases the enchanting vocals of Shreya Goshal, beautifully complemented by AR Rahman's magical composition. The song captures the essence of love and longing, making it a perfect addition to any romantic playlist. Experience the lyrical brilliance of Vairamuthu as it transports you to a world of emotions and melodies.
